LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HEALTHNET, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AT LEAST CAUSES OF ACTION 5 AND 6. THE CLAIMS ARISE UNDER THE MEDICARE ACT AND PLAINTIFF WAS REQUIRED TO EXHAUST ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. ALL OTHER CLAIMS ARE PREEMPTED BY FEDERAL LAW. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
